_comment: SAMPLE Air Traffic Control ops-hazard registry. Copy to ~/.claude/atc-ops-hazards.json (or point ATC_OPS_HAZARDS at it) and replace with YOUR platform's genuinely dangerous commands. The atc-ops-gate hook reads this file — never edit the hook. `pattern` is a Python regex matched against the full command string; `doc` is the governing document that must be Read in the session before the command is allowed. Gate the RAW dangerous command, not a safe wrapper.

hazards.reason: Restarting the core app or proxy takes the whole platform down. Use the health-checked deploy wrapper instead of a raw docker restart.
A shared authoritative DNS server serves every tenant — a bad reload downs all of them. Read the DNS runbook and confirm reversibility first.
This recreates/destroys containers and loses in-container state. Confirm the target and that state is disposable before running.
